title: Ametek (AME) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Ametek (AME) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.49 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.41 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.33 per share a year ago.
